message:
Add RuntimeDir and CacheDir for XDG-compliant state paths

RuntimeDir computes $XDG_STATE_HOME/serf/projects/<hash>/ scoped
by git origin URL (or working dir for non-git projects). CacheDir
returns $XDG_CACHE_HOME/serf/ for global caches like web_fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
